[Pick Up Recruitment Preview]

A new Pick Up Recruitment will begin on 11/1 (Tue)!

Thank you for your understanding.

Pick-Up Recruitment Period: 11/8 (Tue) After Maintenance – 11/22 (Tue) 01:59 (UTC)
